title: campylotropis brevifolia
intro: Campylotropis brevifolia, also known as the "twisted pea vine," is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
